notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.6
First of a series of major updates to all functions: ADBE, Curves, Hyperbolic, Graxpert, Levels, Linear fit, Stat stretch, Star Stretch, SaturationChroma: All have a new icon in the lower left. You can drag that off to the main canvas and it will preserve the parameters you have adjusted for future use. IE you have adjusted the settings in that function to how you like it, you can drag the icon off to create a shortcut with exactly those presets. Double Clicking the shortcut will also open the tool and load all those parameters, including things like manual points drawn on ADBE, Curves, etc.

Other Main Updates: SCNR now has a option for various color removal, not just green. Texture and Clarity has a dedicated unsharp mask. RC-Astro updated to be compatible with rc-astro1.0.0. Blink Comparator will run non-thread safe for non mac users to maximize parallalism.

Various bug fixes that were reported.
